task: Task 1.2 — Key Assumptions of the Paper

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What are the specific mathematical assumptions in Livni et al. 2012's RSVM2 framework that are NOT just generic ML assumptions? I need paper-specific ones
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: The AI identified several paper-specific assumptions: (1) The perturbation distribution satisfies E[x̃]=x (unbiased noise), (2) A single uniform σ is used for all training points, (3) The classifier family is restricted to linear functions (W·x), and (4) The perturbation is measured in ℓ₂ norm specifically. It distinguished these from generic assumptions like iid data.
full_llm_interaction_log.what_it_helped_with: Pointed me toward the E[x̃]=x constraint, the uniform σ, and the linear classifier family. I had already noticed the linearity assumption but hadn't thought about the uniform σ being an assumption
full_llm_interaction_log.verification_method: Verified each against Section 2 and the proof of Theorem 3.1

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Help me write a clear violation scenario for the uniform perturbation budget assumption — when would different points needing different σ values cause problems?
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: The AI suggested heteroscedastic noise as a violation scenario — for example, in medical data where measurement noise varies across instruments or patient populations. Points measured with high-precision equipment would need small σ, while noisy measurements need large σ. Using a single σ would either over-regularize precise points or under-regularize noisy ones.
full_llm_interaction_log.what_it_helped_with: Suggested heteroscedastic noise (medical data example). I adapted this to make it more concrete
full_llm_interaction_log.verification_method: Confirmed that Eq. 3 uses a single σ for all i, making this a real structural assumption

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: Can you help me format these assumptions in clean markdown with the headers: Assumption, Why the Method Needs It, Violation Scenario, Paper Reference?
full_llm_interaction_log.response_summary: The AI provided a markdown template with the four requested headers for each assumption, using bold headers and clean spacing. No actual content was filled in — just the structural template.
full_llm_interaction_log.what_it_helped_with: Got a clean formatting template that I filled with my own content
full_llm_interaction_log.verification_method: All content is my understanding, formatting was assisted
